st.terminal_panel.desc: A compact and intricate terminal panel. The command prompt is blinking, waiting for input.
st.terminal_core.desc: A complex and clever core. A bit pricey, but worth it. Pick it up to start your terminal journey.
st.deps.patchouli: This mod requires §nPatchouli§r as a dependency!
st.command.user.actions: Available actions: switchingmode, changebirthpoint, transmitto_online, transmitto_offline
st.command.user.birth_set: Set spawn point of %s to current location
st.command.user.teleport_offline: %s will be teleported to %s upon next login
